Portable Tripod X Display Hardware for Professional Banner Display

Our Tripod X Display Hardware provides a professional, portable solution for displaying your 24" x 48" banners at trade shows, events, retail locations, and outdoor installations. This durable display system features a lightweight tripod base that folds out for fast setup and breakdown, making it perfect for businesses that need frequent banner installations.

The strong, flexible fiberglass arms keep your banner taut and wrinkle-free for maximum visual impact. Each unit includes a convenient drawstring pouch for easy transport and storage between installations.

Key Features for Professional Banner Display

  • Tripod base folds out for fast and easy setup in any location
  • Strong, flexible fiberglass arms maintain banner tension
  • Lightweight at only 2.2 lbs for easy transport
  • Compact folded dimensions: 26" W x 53" H x 29.5" D
  • Drawstring storage pouch included
  • Compatible with 24" x 48" custom banners
  • Professional-grade construction for repeated use

Note: Banner sold separately. This hardware unit is designed specifically for 24" x 48" banner installations and provides reliable performance for indoor and outdoor display applications.

Custom Tripod X Display Production & Turnaround Times

At Banners.com, we offer flexible production time ranges for your Tripod X Display Hardware orders. Our production times range from two to five business days, giving you complete control over your order timeline to meet your installation deadlines.

Orders received after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day.

Production Time Options

3 Business Day Standard

Tripod X Display Hardware FAQ

What banner size does this Tripod X Display Hardware support?

This hardware unit is specifically designed for 24" x 48" banners. The fiberglass arms and tripod base dimensions are optimized for this banner size to ensure proper tension and display quality.

Is the banner included with the Tripod X Display Hardware?

No, banners are sold separately. This product includes only the portable tripod hardware system with drawstring storage pouch. You can order custom 24" x 48" banners separately to complete your display system.

How much does the Tripod X Display Hardware weigh?

The complete hardware unit weighs only 2.2 lbs, making it extremely portable for transport between installation locations, trade shows, and events.

Can this banner display hardware be used outdoors?

Yes, the Tripod X Display Hardware features durable construction suitable for both indoor and outdoor banner installations. However, we recommend securing the unit in windy conditions for optimal stability.

What are the setup dimensions when the tripod is deployed?

When fully set up for banner display, the dimensions are 26" W x 53" H x 29.5" D, providing a stable base for your 24" x 48" banner installation.

How long does Tripod X Display Hardware production take?

We offer 2, 3, and 5 business day production options for banner display hardware orders, allowing you to choose the timeline that best fits your installation schedule.
